prompt:
Create a NEW Muha Meds 'How to Enter' giveaway poster, FRESH render (do NOT edit reference 1 — use it ONLY for layout reference). Aspect ratio 2:3 vertical / 2048×3072. Aesthetic: EXACT cinematic red/gold/cream/black palette of REFERENCE 2 (5-day countdown poster) — wet-Miami-pavement-at-night, warm amber/red atmospheric glow, deep blacks, gold star/border accents, condensed cream serif lettering, gold cursive script for accents. NO Vice-City synthwave pink/teal neons.

Layout (based on REFERENCE 1 brief):
- Top-left: Muha 'M' gold logo from REFERENCE 3 (use as-is, gold metallic).
- Top: 'HOW TO ENTER THE MUHA MEMBERS' cream subhead.
- Hero headline: 'GIVEAWAY' big bold cream condensed serif, 'Vice City' gold cursive script underneath.
- Three numbered steps in a HORIZONTAL ROW across the upper-middle: gold 1/2/3 numerals with cream all-caps labels:
   • Step 1: '1 GO TO MORE AND TAP "RAFFLES"'
   • Step 2: '2 SELECT "GTA RAFFLE"'
   • Step 3: '3 TAP "SCAN RAFFLE TICKET"'
  Each step is paired with a realistic black-bezel iPhone mockup. Phone screens:
   • Phone 1: render REFERENCE 4 (raffles list screen) faithfully.
   • Phone 2: render REFERENCE 5 ($25,000 raffle detail) faithfully.
   • Phone 3: render REFERENCE 6 (the EARN ENTRIES screen) faithfully BUT with ONE text substitution — where the screenshot title reads 'Scan product code', it must instead read 'Scan Raffle Ticket' in the SAME font (system sans-serif bold), SAME weight, SAME white color, SAME position within the highlighted card. Keep the subtitle below it identical and keep every other element (other rows, navigation, status bar, EARN ENTRIES header, etc.) bit-faithful to REFERENCE 6. The only text change anywhere on the phone is 'Scan product code' → 'Scan Raffle Ticket'.
- Below the phones: large hero red Dodge Challenger SRT EXACTLY matching REFERENCE 2.
- Bottom-LEFT: a CLEAN EMPTY QR PLACEHOLDER — perfectly square FLAT pure-white box, EXACTLY 670×670 px (≈33% of 2048-wide canvas). PURE solid white interior — NO text, NO labels, NO 'SCAN' tag, NO QR code, NO modules, NO dots, NO patterns, NO brackets, NO corner marks INSIDE or OVERLAPPING the square. Only allowed treatment: thin warm gold outline (~3 px) on the OUTSIDE edge, soft warm drop shadow BEHIND, faint warm red/amber outer glow BEHIND. The interior must remain entirely empty white for post-production QR drop-in.
- To the right of the placeholder: gold cursive 'Scan to Find Out!' callout with curved gold arrow pointing AT the placeholder.
- Bottom-right corner: small palm tree silhouette accent.
- Bottom strip: small cream disclaimer 'Only eligible QR codes will automatically enter you into the GTA Raffle. Not every product has a GTA Raffle QR code.'

Ultra-sharp render. CRITICAL: step 3 says 'SCAN RAFFLE TICKET' (not 'SCAN PRODUCT CODE') in BOTH the poster label AND inside the phone screen.
